title: HungryChix
description: Now animals eat their favorite food when it's dropped as an item!
body:
This simple mod makes animals eat food that's dropped on ground, allowing to make automatic animal farms using basic redstone machines.

# Supported mobs
These animals are fully supported. When an animal from this list sees an item of its' favorite food within 10 blocks from it, it'll go to this item, **only** if it's ready to enter love mode after eating.

| Animal      	| Favorite food                    	|
|-------------	|----------------------------------	|
| **Bee**     	| Any flower                       	|
| **Chicken** 	| Any seeds                        	|
| **Cow**     	| Wheat                            	|
| **Pig**     	| Carrot, Potato, Beetroot         	|
| **Rabbit**  	| Carrot, Golden carrot, Dandelion 	|
| **Sheep**   	| Wheat                            	|
| **Turtle**  	| Seagrass                         	|

# Unsupported mobs
Below animals keep ignoring their favorite food but can be fed from players' hands.

## Horses
**Will** be added in future versions.

## Llamas
**May** be added in future versions.

## Pandas
**Will not** be added in future versions.
Pandas require additional conditions to enter love mode. Otherwise, they'll just eat the bamboo.

![A panda eating bamboo](https://media.tenor.com/3tu17YEoNYMAAAAC/panda-minecraft-panda.gif)

## Striders
**Will** be added in future versions. Requires some additional work with sounds.

## Cats and Ocelots
**May** be added in future versions.

## Dogs and Wolves
**Will** be added in future versions. These animals *beg* for food instead of being *tempted*, so they require some additional work to be done.

## Foxes
**May** be added in future versions.
